<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>HILARA — Handcrafted Console Table</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400;1,600&family=Jost:wght@200;300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --ink:    #0E0905;
  --beech:  #8B5E3C;
  --honey:  #C49A6C;
  --teal:   #0FA5B5;
  --teal2:  #3DBFCC;
  --pearl:  #F0EAD6;
  --muted:  rgba(240,234,214,0.5);
  --border: rgba(240,234,214,0.08);
}
*, *::before, *::after { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
body { background:var(--ink); color:var(--pearl); font-family:'Jost',sans-serif; font-weight:300; font-size:15px; line-height:1.8; overflow-x:hidden; }
img { max-width:100%; display:block; }
a { text-decoration:none; }

/* TOP BAR */
body::before { content:''; position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--teal),var(--teal2) 50%,transparent); z-index:300; }

/* ═══════════ NAV ═══════════ */
nav {
  position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:200;
  height:68px; padding:0 5%;
  display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  background:rgba(14,9,5,0.92); backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.nav-logo { height:44px; }
.nav-links { display:flex; gap:32px; list-style:none; align-items:center; }
.nav-links a { font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.3em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--muted); transition:color 0.25s; }
.nav-links a:hover { color:var(--teal); }
.nav-cta { background:var(--teal) !important; color:#fff !important; padding:9px 20px !important; letter-spacing:0.2em !important; transition:background 0.25s !important; }
.nav-cta:hover { background:var(--teal2) !important; }

/* Hamburger */
.hamburger { display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; cursor:pointer; padding:4px; background:none; border:none; }
.hamburger span { width:24px; height:1.5px; background:var(--pearl); display:block; transition:all 0.3s; }
.hamburger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform:translateY(6.5px) rotate(45deg); }
.hamburger.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity:0; }
.hamburger.open span:nth-child(3) { transform:translateY(-6.5px) rotate(-45deg); }

/* Mobile menu */
.mobile-menu {
  display:none; position:fixed; top:68px; left:0; right:0; bottom:0;
  background:rgba(14,9,5,0.98); backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
  z-index:199; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:36px;
}
.mobile-menu.open { display:flex; }
.mobile-menu a { font-size:18px; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--pearl); transition:color 0.25s; }
.mobile-menu a:hover { color:var(--teal); }
.mobile-menu .m-cta { background:var(--teal); color:#fff; padding:16px 40px; font-size:12px; }

/* ═══════════ HERO ═══════════ */
.hero {
  height:100vh; min-height:600px;
  position:relative; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  text-align:center; overflow:hidden;
}
.hero-bg {
  position:absolute; inset:0;
  background:url('data:image/png;base64,') center/cover no-repeat;
  filter:brightness(0.4); transform:scale(1.04); transition:transform 12s ease;
}
.hero:hover .hero-bg { transform:scale(1.0); }
.hero-grad { position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(14,9,5,0.95) 0%,rgba(14,9,5,0.2) 60%,rgba(14,9,5,0.3) 100%); }
.hero-content { position:relative; z-index:2; padding:0 24px; width:100%; max-width:900px; }
.hero-eyebrow {
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:28px;
  font-size:9px; letter-spacing:0.5em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--teal);
  animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.2s both;
}
.hero-eyebrow::before, .hero-eyebrow::after { content:''; width:24px; height:1px; background:var(--teal); }
.hero-logo {
  width:min(700px, 88vw); height:auto;
  margin:0 auto 32px;
  animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.4s both;
}
.hero-desc {
  font-size:clamp(13px,2vw,16px); color:rgba(240,234,214,0.6);
  line-height:1.9; max-width:520px; margin:0 auto 36px;
  animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.6s both;
}
.hero-btns {
  display:flex; gap:14px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;
  animation:fadeUp 1s ease 0.8s both;
}
.btn-p { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; background:var(--teal); color:#fff; padding:14px 28px; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.3em; text-transform:uppercase; transition:background 0.25s; }
.btn-p:hover { background:var(--teal2); }
.btn-g { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; border:1px solid rgba(240,234,214,0.25); color:var(--muted); padding:14px 28px; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.3em; text-transform:uppercase; transition:all 0.25s; }
.btn-g:hover { border-color:var(--teal); color:var(--teal); }
.hero-scroll { position:absolute; bottom:32px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:8px; animation:fadeUp 1s ease 1.2s both; }
.hero-scroll span { font-size:8px; letter-spacing:0.4em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--muted); }
.scroll-bar { width:1px; height:48px; background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--teal),transparent); animation:pulse 2s ease infinite; }

/* ═══════════ FEATURES ═══════════ */
.features { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); border-top:1px solid var(--border); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); }
.feat { padding:32px 28px; border-right:1px solid var(--border); transition:background 0.25s; }
.feat:last-child { border-right:none; }
.feat:hover { background:rgba(15,165,181,0.04); }
.feat-icon { font-size:18px; color:var(--teal); margin-bottom:10px; }
.feat-title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:16px; color:var(--pearl); margin-bottom:6px; }
.feat-desc { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.65; }

/* ═══════════ SECTIONS ═══════════ */
.sec { padding:clamp(60px,8vw,110px) 5%; }
.sec-inner { max-width:1240px; margin:0 auto; }
.eyebrow { font-size:9px; letter-spacing:0.5em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--teal); margin-bottom:12px; }
.title { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,52px); font-weight:300; line-height:1.1; letter-spacing:-0.01em; margin-bottom:22px; }
.title em { font-style:italic; color:var(--beech); }
.rule { width:44px; height:1px; background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--teal),transparent); margin-bottom:24px; }
.body-p { font-size:clamp(13px,1.5vw,15px); color:var(--muted); line-height:1.9; margin-bottom:16px; }
.body-p strong { color:var(--pearl); font-weight:400; }

/* INTRO */
.intro-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:clamp(32px,5vw,80px); align-items:center; }
.price-block { display:inline-flex; flex-direction:column; margin-top:24px; padding:18px 24px; border:1px solid rgba(15,165,181,0.3); background:rgba(15,165,181,0.06); gap:3px; }
.price-label { font-size:8px; letter-spacing:0.45em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--teal); }
.price-val { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,38px); font-weight:300; color:var(--pearl); }
.intro-img { position:relative; }
.intro-img img { width:100%; }
.intro-img::after { content:''; position:absolute; top:-12px; right:-12px; bottom:12px; left:12px; border:1px solid rgba(15,165,181,0.15); z-index:-1; }

/* GALLERY */
.gallery-wrap { background:#060402; }
.gallery-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows:500px 500px; gap:3px; }
.g { overflow:hidden; position:relative; background:#0A0604; }
.g.wide { grid-column:span 2; }
.g img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition:transform 0.8s ease; }
.g:hover img { transform:scale(1.04); }
.g-cap { position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; padding:36px 24px 20px; background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(14,9,5,0.85),transparent); opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; }
.g:hover .g-cap { opacity:1; }
.g-cap span { font-size:9px; letter-spacing:0.28em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(240,234,214,0.7); }

/* PATTERN */
.pattern-wrap { background:#040201; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; min-height:560px; }
.pat-img { overflow:hidden; }
.pat-img img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; filter:brightness(0.72); transition:transform 0.7s; }
.pat-img:hover img { transform:scale(1.03); }
.pat-body { padding:clamp(40px,6vw,80px) clamp(32px,5vw,70px); background:#080403; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; }
.blockquote { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(15px,1.8vw,19px); font-style:italic; font-weight:300; color:rgba(240,234,214,0.65); line-height:1.7; border-left:2px solid var(--teal); padding-left:20px; margin:24px 0; }
.facts { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px; margin-top:28px; }
.fact { padding:16px 18px; border-top:2px solid var(--teal); background:rgba(15,165,181,0.04); }
.fact-n { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(24px,3vw,32px); color:var(--teal); line-height:1; margin-bottom:3px; }
.fact-t { font-size:8px; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--pearl); margin-bottom:3px; }
.fact-d { font-size:11px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.6; }

/* MATERIALS */
.mat-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:2px; margin-top:48px; }
.mat { padding:32px 22px; text-align:center; transition:transform 0.25s; }
.mat:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); }
.mat:nth-child(1) { background:#2C1B0F; }
.mat:nth-child(2) { background:#1C1008; }
.mat:nth-child(3) { background:#04191C; }
.mat:nth-child(4) { background:#0A1012; }
.mat-dot { width:44px; height:44px; border-radius:50%; margin:0 auto 16px; }
.mat-name { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:17px; margin-bottom:7px; font-weight:400; }
.mat-info { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.65; }
.palette { display:flex; margin-top:48px; height:60px; }
.sw { flex:1; position:relative; }
.sw-label { position:absolute; bottom:-22px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); font-size:8px; letter-spacing:0.12em; white-space:nowrap; color:var(--muted); }

/* SPECS */
.specs-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:clamp(24px,5vw,64px); margin-top:48px; }
.spec-line { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:baseline; padding:12px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); font-size:clamp(12px,1.2vw,14px); gap:12px; }
.sk { color:var(--muted); flex-shrink:0; }
.sv { color:var(--pearl); font-weight:400; text-align:right; }

/* CTA */
.cta { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0C1A1C,#091210); border-top:1px solid rgba(15,165,181,0.15); border-bottom:1px solid rgba(15,165,181,0.15); padding:clamp(48px,7vw,80px) 5%; text-align:center; }
.cta h2 { font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif; font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,46px); font-weight:300; color:var(--pearl); margin-bottom:10px; }
.cta p { color:var(--muted); font-size:clamp(12px,1.5vw,14px); margin-bottom:32px; }
.cta-btns { display:flex; gap:14px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; }

/* FOOTER */
footer { padding:clamp(40px,6vw,60px) 5%; border-top:1px solid var(--border); }
.footer-inner { max-width:1240px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr 1fr; gap:40px; align-items:start; }
.footer-logo { height:56px; margin-bottom:14px; }
.footer-tag { font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.75; }
.footer-col h4 { font-size:9px; letter-spacing:0.35em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--teal); margin-bottom:12px; }
.footer-col p, .footer-col a { font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.9; display:block; transition:color 0.2s; }
.footer-col a:hover { color:var(--pearl); }
.footer-bot { max-width:1240px; margin:32px auto 0; padding-top:20px; border-top:1px solid var(--border); text-align:center; font-size:10px; color:rgba(240,234,214,0.18); letter-spacing:0.15em; }

/* ═══════════ ANIMATIONS ═══════════ */
@keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} }
@keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.2} }

/* ═══════════ TABLET (max 1024px) ═══════════ */
@media(max-width:1024px){
  .features { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
  .feat:nth-child(2) { border-right:none; }
  .feat:nth-child(3) { border-top:1px solid var(--border); }
  .feat:nth-child(4) { border-top:1px solid var(--border); border-right:none; }
  .mat-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
  .footer-inner { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
}

/* ═══════════ MOBILE (max 768px) ═══════════ */
@media(max-width:768px){
  /* Nav */
  .nav-links { display:none; }
  .hamburger { display:flex; }
  nav { height:60px; }
  .mobile-menu { top:60px; }

  /* Hero */
  .hero-logo { width:min(480px,88vw); }
  .hero-eyebrow { font-size:8px; letter-spacing:0.35em; }
  .hero-btns { flex-direction:column; align-items:center; }
  .btn-p, .btn-g { width:100%; max-width:280px; justify-content:center; }

  /* Features */
  .features { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .feat { border-right:none; border-top:1px solid var(--border); }
  .feat:first-child { border-top:none; }

  /* Intro */
  .intro-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .intro-img { order:-1; }
  .intro-img::after { display:none; }

  /* Gallery */
  .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; grid-template-rows:auto; }
  .g { height:260px; }
  .g.wide { grid-column:span 1; height:280px; }

  /* Pattern */
  .pattern-wrap { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .pat-img { height:260px; }
  .facts { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }

  /* Materials */
  .mat-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; }
  .palette { flex-wrap:wrap; height:auto; gap:2px; }
  .sw { height:44px; min-width:calc(25% - 2px); flex:none; }
  .sw-label { display:none; }

  /* Specs */
  .specs-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:0; }

  /* Footer */
  .footer-inner { grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:28px; }
  .footer-bot { font-size:9px; }
}

/* ═══════════ SMALL MOBILE (max 420px) ═══════════ */
@media(max-width:420px){
  .hero-logo { width:92vw; }
  .facts { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .mat-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="nav-logo" alt="Hilara"/>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#story">Story</a></li>
    <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pattern">Pattern</a></li>
    <li><a href="#materials">Materials</a></li>
    <li><a href="#specs">Specs</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Enquire</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" aria-label="Menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- MOBILE MENU -->
<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <a href="#story" onclick="closeMenu()">Story</a>
  <a href="#gallery" onclick="closeMenu()">Gallery</a>
  <a href="#pattern" onclick="closeMenu()">Pattern</a>
  <a href="#materials" onclick="closeMenu()">Materials</a>
  <a href="#specs" onclick="closeMenu()">Specs</a>
  <a href="#contact" class="m-cta" onclick="closeMenu()">Enquire</a>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grad"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Handcrafted Console · Islamic Cairo · 2026</div>
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="hero-logo" alt="Hilara"/>
    <p class="hero-desc">A handcrafted beechwood console rooted in the Abu Janzeer pattern, a six-pointed geometric lattice native to the Al-Hussein district of Islamic Cairo, dating to the Mamluk era.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#story" class="btn-p">Discover the Piece</a>
      <a href="#specs" class="btn-g">View Specifications</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <div class="scroll-bar"></div>
    <span>Scroll</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<div class="features">
  <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">◈</div><div class="feat-title">Abu Janzeer Pattern</div><p class="feat-desc">800-year-old geometric lattice from Islamic Cairo, CNC-carved and hand-inlaid.</p></div>
  <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">◈</div><div class="feat-title">Solid Beechwood</div><p class="feat-desc">Kiln-dried, varnished in warm walnut tone. Dowel joinery throughout.</p></div>
  <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">◈</div><div class="feat-title">Hand-Placed Inlay</div><p class="feat-desc">Every piece cut and set individually into CNC-carved cavities. One at a time.</p></div>
  <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">◈</div><div class="feat-title">One of a Kind</div><p class="feat-desc">Not mass produced. A single handcrafted piece designed for the contemporary home.</p></div>
</div>

<!-- STORY -->
<section class="sec" id="story">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="intro-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="eyebrow">The Object</div>
        <h2 class="title">Where <em>heritage</em><br/>meets the home</h2>
        <div class="rule"></div>
        <p class="body-p">Hilara is a handcrafted beechwood console rooted in the Abu Janzeer pattern, a six-pointed geometric lattice native to the Al-Hussein district of Islamic Cairo, dating to the Mamluk era.</p>
        <p class="body-p">The half-moon tabletop and vertical leg structure were developed from the geometry and rhythm of the pattern, translating its visual language into a contemporary furniture piece. Pearl inlay in turquoise and white is recessed flush into the surface alongside a recessed glass panel.</p>
        <p class="body-p"><strong>Traditional dowel joinery is used throughout.</strong></p>
        <div class="price-block">
          <span class="price-label">Selling Price</span>
          <span class="price-val">25,000 L.E</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="intro-img">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Hilara in context"/>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<section class="gallery-wrap" id="gallery">
  <div class="gallery-grid">
    <div class="g wide"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Hilara entrance hall"/><div class="g-cap"><span>Product in Context · Entrance Hall</span></div></div>
    <div class="g"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Hilara arched mirror"/><div class="g-cap"><span>Hilara · Arched Mirror Setting</span></div></div>
    <div class="g"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Hilara modern"/><div class="g-cap"><span>Hilara · Contemporary Interior</span></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PATTERN -->
<section id="pattern" style="padding:0;background:#040201;">
  <div class="pattern-wrap">
    <div class="pat-img"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Abu Janzeer"/></div>
    <div class="pat-body">
      <div class="eyebrow">The Pattern</div>
      <h2 class="title" style="font-size:clamp(28px,3.5vw,42px);">Abu<br/><em>Janzeer</em></h2>
      <div class="rule"></div>
      <p class="body-p">Documented in the Al-Hussein district of Islamic Cairo since the Mamluk era. A six-pointed star lattice built from interlocking pieces, connected by traditional joinery alone. No glue. No nails.</p>
      <div class="blockquote">"What appears to be a single carved plank is hundreds of individual pieces, each locked to its neighbour by geometry alone."</div>
      <div class="facts">
        <div class="fact"><div class="fact-n">800+</div><div class="fact-t">Years of history</div><div class="fact-d">All original screens commissioned exclusively by Mamluk sultans within a fifty-year window.</div></div>
        <div class="fact"><div class="fact-n">0</div><div class="fact-t">Nails or glue</div><div class="fact-d">Each star locked to its neighbours using only traditional joinery.</div></div>
        <div class="fact"><div class="fact-n">6</div><div class="fact-t">Points per star</div><div class="fact-d">Every unit built around a six-pointed star, radiating outward infinitely.</div></div>
        <div class="fact"><div class="fact-n">∞</div><div class="fact-t">No terminus</div><div class="fact-d">Tiles in every direction with zero gaps and zero overlaps. It never ends.</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MATERIALS -->
<section class="sec" id="materials" style="background:#050302;">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="eyebrow">Materials</div>
    <h2 class="title">Every detail<br/><em>intentional</em></h2>
    <div class="mat-grid">
      <div class="mat"><div class="mat-dot" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8B5E3C,#5A3522);"></div><div class="mat-name" style="color:#C49A6C;">Beechwood</div><p class="mat-info">Solid kiln-dried beechwood. Fine even grain, warm walnut tone after varnishing. Primary structural material throughout.</p></div>
      <div class="mat"><div class="mat-dot" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F0EAD6,#DDD3B8);border:1px solid rgba(240,234,214,0.2);"></div><div class="mat-name" style="color:#F0EAD6;">Pearl Inlay</div><p class="mat-info">White acrylic pearl inlay, hand-cut and placed individually into CNC-carved cavities at 1.5mm depth.</p></div>
      <div class="mat"><div class="mat-dot" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0FA5B5,#3DBFCC);"></div><div class="mat-name" style="color:#3DBFCC;">Turquoise Inlay</div><p class="mat-info">Turquoise acrylic inlay, hand-cut and placed piece by piece alongside the pearl to build the pattern.</p></div>
      <div class="mat"><div class="mat-dot" style="background:rgba(200,225,235,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(200,225,235,0.2);"></div><div class="mat-name" style="color:rgba(240,234,214,0.55);">Recessed Glass</div><p class="mat-info">0.6mm glass panel recessed into a 0.7mm cavity, sitting flush within the tabletop plane.</p></div>
    </div>
    <div class="palette" style="margin-bottom:30px;">
      <div class="sw" style="background:#5A3522;"><span class="sw-label">Walnut</span></div>
      <div class="sw" style="background:#8B5E3C;"><span class="sw-label">Beech</span></div>
      <div class="sw" style="background:#C49A6C;"><span class="sw-label">Honey</span></div>
      <div class="sw" style="background:#F0EAD6;"><span class="sw-label">Pearl</span></div>
      <div class="sw" style="background:#0FA5B5;"><span class="sw-label">Teal</span></div>
      <div class="sw" style="background:#3DBFCC;"><span class="sw-label">Turquoise</span></div>
      <div class="sw" style="background:#D8EFF3;"><span class="sw-label">Glass</span></div>
      <div class="sw" style="background:#1C1008;border:1px solid rgba(240,234,214,0.08);"><span class="sw-label">Ink</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SPECS -->
<section class="sec" id="specs" style="background:#080503;">
  <div class="sec-inner">
    <div class="eyebrow">Specifications</div>
    <h2 class="title">Built with<br/><em>precision</em></h2>
    <div class="rule"></div>
    <div class="specs-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Object</span><span class="sv">Console Table</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Form</span><span class="sv">Half-Moon Plan</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Diameter</span><span class="sv">90 cm</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Depth</span><span class="sv">45 cm</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Primary Material</span><span class="sv">Solid Beechwood</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Finish</span><span class="sv">Dark Walnut Varnish</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Joinery</span><span class="sv">Dowel Construction</span></div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Surface Pattern</span><span class="sv">Abu Janzeer · CNC Carved</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Inlay Material</span><span class="sv">Acrylic · Turquoise and White</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Inlay Depth</span><span class="sv">1.5 mm</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Glass Panel</span><span class="sv">0.6 mm · Recessed at 0.7 mm</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Leg Feet</span><span class="sv">5 × 1 cm Protective Feet</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Production Cost</span><span class="sv">12,300 L.E</span></div>
        <div class="spec-line"><span class="sk">Selling Price</span><span class="sv">25,000 L.E</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="cta" id="contact">
  <h2>Own a piece of Islamic Cairo</h2>
  <p>Handcrafted · One of a Kind · Available for the Contemporary Home</p>
  <div class="cta-btns">
    <a href="mailto:janamasry8@gmail.com" class="btn-p">Enquire Now</a>
    <a href="#gallery" class="btn-g">View Gallery</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="footer-logo" alt="Hilara"/>
      <p class="footer-tag">A handcrafted beechwood console rooted in the geometric heritage of Islamic Cairo.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Navigate</h4>
      <a href="#story">Story</a>
      <a href="#gallery">Gallery</a>
      <a href="#pattern">Abu Janzeer Pattern</a>
      <a href="#materials">Materials</a>
      <a href="#specs">Specifications</a>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-col">
      <h4>Credits</h4>
      <p>Jana Masry · 55-8557</p>
      <p>GUC · Product Design</p>
      <p>Furniture Track 1 · Premasters 2026</p>
      <p>Dr. Jasmin Wardani</p>
      <p>TA Hayat Khaled</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bot">HILARA · GUC PRODUCT DESIGN · PREMASTERS 2026 · JANA MASRY</div>
</footer>

<script>
// Hamburger
const ham = document.getElementById('hamburger');
const menu = document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
ham.addEventListener('click', () => {
  ham.classList.toggle('open');
  menu.classList.toggle('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = menu.classList.contains('open') ? 'hidden' : '';
});
function closeMenu() {
  ham.classList.remove('open');
  menu.classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
// Close on outside click
document.addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (!ham.contains(e.target) && !menu.contains(e.target)) closeMenu();
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
